name: Thelma & Louise
sourceStatus: Public Airbnb facts checked May 27, 2026; internal Thelma & Louise naming still needs host confirmation
title: A Blankenberge stay built from friendship and shared ambition.
tagline: The coastal chapter that carries the spirit of doing something together.
description: Thelma & Louise is mapped to the Stefanie-hosted Blankenberge apartment from Laurens’ account links. The public Airbnb facts are integrated, while the internal brand-name match should still be confirmed by the team.

media.caption: Living room and balcony gallery slot

quickFacts.label: Bathroom
quickFacts.value: Toilet and sink; showers in bedrooms

listingHighlights.label: Beach proximity
listingHighlights.value: The public listing places the apartment 150 m from the beach, with Sea Life, Belgium Pier, dunes, and beach bars nearby.

listingHighlights.label: Pet-friendly
listingHighlights.value: The Airbnb page highlights furry friends as welcome.

listingHighlights.label: Host nearby
listingHighlights.value: Stefanie’s host bio says she lives nearby in Blankenberge and focuses on smooth, comfortable stays.

stayStory.title: The stay
stayStory.text: This Blankenberge apartment gives the collection a compact coastal stay with beach, tram, and local attractions close by.

stayStory.title: The story
stayStory.text: The House of Wander briefing frames Thelma & Louise as a shared venture with friends, which fits the co-hosted nature of this listing but still needs final name confirmation.

stayStory.title: Inside
stayStory.text: The public listing describes a living room, small kitchen, balcony, one double bedroom with shower and sink, and one bunk room with sink.

stayStory.title: Access
stayStory.text: Guests access the whole apartment on the third floor of Jacques residence; there is no elevator.

amenityGroups.title: Sleeping setup
items: Shower and sink in one bedroom

amenityGroups.title: Nearby
items: Blankenberge station one tram stop away

bookingSteps: Use Airbnb to confirm live dates, price, cancellation policy, and final availability.
Select the correct guest count, with 4 guests maximum as the current public maximum.
Keep payment and guest-host messaging inside Airbnb until a direct booking layer is approved.
Use House of Wander for story, comparison, guidance, and source-labelled decision support.
houseNotes: The apartment is on the 3rd floor without an elevator.
Nearby water body and climbing/play structure safety notes are listed.
locationNote: The mapped listing is in Blankenberge, 150 m from the beach, with tram access directly outside and train connection one tram stop away.
sourceNotes: Public Airbnb facts were checked on May 27, 2026 without login.
The source URL came from Laurens’ account listing list, but the internal Thelma & Louise brand name should still be confirmed by Maaike, Laudi, or Laurens.
Airbnb-hosted photos are catalogued only as references and are not displayed on the site.
Live price, availability, cancellation, payment, and messaging remain on Airbnb.

amigoStayPlan.title: Fit guide
amigoStayPlan.text: Amigo can explain this as the pet-friendly Blankenberge beach apartment and flag the 3rd-floor/no-lift access clearly.

amigoStayPlan.title: Name guardrail
amigoStayPlan.text: Amigo should say this is currently mapped to Thelma & Louise pending final internal naming confirmation.

amigoStayPlan.title: Booking guardrail
amigoStayPlan.text: Amigo keeps live price, availability, cancellation, and payment on Airbnb.

amigoPrompts.label: Is this Thelma & Louise?
amigoPrompts.answer: This page maps Thelma & Louise to the Stefanie-hosted Blankenberge Airbnb from Laurens’ listing links. The public facts are real, but the internal brand-name match still needs team confirmation.

amigoPrompts.label: What should guests know?
amigoPrompts.answer: It is 150 m from the beach, pet-friendly, on the 3rd floor without an elevator, and has a double bedroom plus bunk room. The bathroom setup is unusual: toilet and sink, with shower facilities in bedrooms.

amigoPrompts.label: How do I book?
amigoPrompts.answer: Use Airbnb for dates, price, cancellation, payment, and messaging. House of Wander is the guided information layer for now.
